message:
fix(dcg): robustness improvements from code review

- Add safe JSON.parse with fallbacks in dcg-config.service.ts to prevent
  crashes on corrupt stored data
- Fix promise caching in dcg.service.ts to allow retry if initial sync fails
- Add shell escaping for filenames and commit messages in extractCommandsFromAction
  to prevent command injection/breakage with special characters

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
